scheme_name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
page_content:
Scheme Name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: All landholding farmers families with cultivable land. Annual family income must be below Rs. 200000. Age 18 to 65 years. Applicable to all caste categories including SC, ST, OBC, General. Farmer or agricultural worker occupation required.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 6000 per year
Benefits: Financial benefit of Rs. 6000 per year is provided in three equal installments of Rs. 2000 each every four months directly to the bank accounts of farmer families.
Application Process: Farmers can register through the PM-KISAN portal, Common Service Centres or through local Patwari/Revenue Officer. Documents required: Aadhaar card, bank account details, land records.
Application URL: https://pmkisan.gov.in
Source PDF: https://pmkisan.gov.in/documents/pmkisan_guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: PM Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

scheme_name: UP Scholarship Scheme (Pre and Post Matric)
page_content:
Scheme Name: UP Scholarship Scheme (Pre and Post Matric)
Ministry/Department: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Uttar Pradesh
State: Uttar Pradesh
Eligibility Criteria: Student must be a permanent resident of Uttar Pradesh. Annual family income should not exceed Rs. 200000 for OBC and Rs. 250000 for SC and ST categories. Caste categories: SC, ST, OBC students are eligible. Occupation: Student. Age 10 to 25 years. Must be enrolled in a recognized school or college in Uttar Pradesh.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 3000 to Rs. 12000 per annum
Benefits: Financial assistance ranging from Rs. 3000 to Rs. 12000 per year depending on class and category. Amount credited directly to bank account.
Application Process: Apply online at scholarship.up.gov.in. Documents required: Caste certificate, income certificate, enrollment certificate, Aadhaar card, bank passbook.
Application URL: https://scholarship.up.gov.in
Source PDF: https://scholarship.up.gov.in/docs/scholarship_guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: UP Scholarship Scheme (Pre and Post Matric)
metadata.ministry: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Uttar Pradesh

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
page_content:
Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Rural Development
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Houseless families and families living in kutcha or dilapidated houses in rural areas. Annual family income below Rs. 120000. Beneficiaries identified from SECC-2011 data. Priority to SC, ST, minorities, and differently abled persons. No existing pucca house should be owned by any family member. Age 18 years and above.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 1.20 lakh to Rs. 1.30 lakh
Benefits: Financial assistance of Rs. 1.20 lakh in plain areas and Rs. 1.30 lakh in hilly/difficult areas for construction of a pucca house with basic amenities. Convergence with MGNREGS for 90-95 days of unskilled labour.
Application Process: Beneficiaries are selected based on SECC-2011 data. Contact local Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office. Apply through AwaasSoft portal or Awaas App.
Application URL: https://pmayg.nic.in
Source PDF: https://pmayg.nic.in/netiay/Shared/Documents/PMAY_G_Guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Rural Development

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
page_content:
Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Finance
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Any Indian citizen who has a business plan for non-farm income generating activity such as manufacturing, processing, trading or service sector. Women entrepreneurs, SC, ST, OBC applicants given priority. Age 18 to 65 years. No income limit. Loan amount up to Rs. 10 lakh. Occupation: woman entrepreneur, worker, farmer, self-employed.
Benefit Amount: Loan up to Rs. 10 lakh
Benefits: Three categories: Shishu (up to Rs. 50000), Kishore (Rs. 50001 to Rs. 5 lakh), Tarun (Rs. 5 lakh to Rs. 10 lakh). No collateral required for Shishu and Kishore loans. Subsidized interest rates.
Application Process: Apply through any scheduled commercial bank, regional rural bank, microfinance institution or NBFC. Submit business plan, identity proof, address proof. Apply online at mudra.org.in or visit nearest bank.
Application URL: https://www.mudra.org.in
Source PDF: https://www.mudra.org.in/content/mudra-yojana-guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri MUDRA Yojana (PMMY)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Finance

scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
page_content:
Scheme Name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Rural Development
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Senior citizens aged 60 years and above belonging to Below Poverty Line (BPL) households. Annual family income below Rs. 100000. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. Occupation: Senior citizen. Must be a resident of India.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 200 to Rs. 500 per month
Benefits: Monthly pension of Rs. 200 for persons aged 60 to 79 years and Rs. 500 for persons aged 80 years and above. State governments may provide additional top-up amounts.
Application Process: Apply through local Gram Panchayat or Urban Local Body. Submit age proof, BPL card/income certificate, Aadhaar, bank account details. State governments manage actual implementation.
Application URL: https://nsap.nic.in
Source PDF: https://nsap.nic.in/Documents/ignoaps_guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Indira Gandhi National Old Age Pension Scheme (IGNOAPS)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Rural Development

scheme_name: Stand-Up India Scheme
page_content:
Scheme Name: Stand-Up India Scheme
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Finance, Department of Financial Services
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: SC, ST borrowers and women entrepreneurs setting up greenfield enterprises. Age 18 years and above. Occupation: woman entrepreneur. The enterprise must be in manufacturing, services or trading sector. At least 51% shareholding by SC/ST or woman entrepreneur. Annual income no restriction.
Benefit Amount: Loan Rs. 10 lakh to Rs. 1 crore
Benefits: Bank loans between Rs. 10 lakh and Rs. 1 crore for setting up greenfield enterprises. Composite loan including term loan and working capital. At least one SC/ST borrower and one woman borrower per bank branch.
Application Process: Apply through any scheduled commercial bank branch or through www.standupmitra.in portal. Documents: business plan, identity proof, address proof, caste/category certificate.
Application URL: https://www.standupmitra.in
Source PDF: https://www.standupmitra.in/Home/SumiFiles/standup_guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Stand-Up India Scheme
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Finance
metadata.benefit_amount: Loan Rs. 10 lakh to Rs. 1 crore

scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana)
page_content:
Scheme Name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Families identified as poor and vulnerable based on SECC-2011 database. Annual family income below Rs. 100000. Priority to SC, ST, OBC categories. Workers, farmers, labourers eligible. All age groups. No restriction on family size.
Benefit Amount: Health cover Rs. 5 lakh per family per year
Benefits: Health cover of Rs. 5 lakh per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization. Covers pre and post-hospitalization expenses. Cashless and paperless access to healthcare services at empanelled hospitals across India.
Application Process: Check eligibility at pmjay.gov.in or call 14555. Visit nearest empanelled hospital or Common Service Centre with Aadhaar card. No need to apply separately if family is in SECC list.
Application URL: https://pmjay.gov.in
Source PDF: https://pmjay.gov.in/sites/default/files/2018-09/PM-JAY_Guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY (Pradhan Mantri Jan Arogya Yojana)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
metadata.benefit_amount: Health cover Rs. 5 lakh per family per year

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
page_content:
Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: All farmers growing notified crops in notified areas. Applicable to farmers of all caste categories - SC, ST, OBC, General. Farmer occupation required. Age 18 years and above. Both loanee and non-loanee farmers can apply. Annual income no restriction.
Benefit Amount: Crop insurance cover as per sum insured
Benefits: Financial support to farmers suffering crop loss/damage due to unforeseen events. Premium as low as 1.5% for Rabi crops, 2% for Kharif crops, 5% for commercial/horticultural crops. Rest of premium paid by Central and State governments.
Application Process: Loanee farmers: enrolled automatically by bank. Non-loanee farmers: apply at nearest bank, insurance company office or Common Service Centre before cut-off date. Documents: land records, bank account details, Aadhaar.
Application URL: https://pmfby.gov.in
Source PDF: https://pmfby.gov.in/pdf/OM_PMFBY_English.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare

scheme_name: NHFDC Loan Scheme for Persons with Disabilities
page_content:
Scheme Name: NHFDC Loan Scheme for Persons with Disabilities
Ministry/Department: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Ministry of Social Justice
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Persons with disabilities (differently abled/divyang) with at least 40% disability. Age 18 to 55 years. Annual family income below Rs. 300000 for general category and Rs. 500000 for SC/ST. All caste categories eligible. Occupation: differently abled, worker, student, self-employed.
Benefit Amount: Loan up to Rs. 30 lakh at concessional rates
Benefits: Concessional loans at 2% to 5% interest rate for self-employment and livelihood activities. Loan amount up to Rs. 30 lakh. Grant assistance also available for skill development.
Application Process: Apply through State Channelising Agencies (SCAs) or District Disability Rehabilitation Centres. Documents: disability certificate, income certificate, Aadhaar, bank account details, project report.
Application URL: https://www.nhfdc.nic.in
Source PDF: https://www.nhfdc.nic.in/pdf/NHFDC_Guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: NHFDC Loan Scheme for Persons with Disabilities
metadata.ministry: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities
metadata.benefit_amount: Loan up to Rs. 30 lakh at concessional rates

scheme_name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
page_content:
Scheme Name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: All farmers including small, marginal, share croppers, oral lessees and tenant farmers. Age 18 to 75 years. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General. Farmer occupation. Annual income no upper limit. Must have agricultural land or be engaged in farming activity.
Benefit Amount: Credit limit based on land holding and crop
Benefits: Short term credit needs for crop cultivation, post-harvest expenses, produce marketing and allied activities. Interest rate as low as 4% per annum after interest subvention. Credit limit up to Rs. 3 lakh at subsidized rates.
Application Process: Apply at nearest bank branch, Regional Rural Bank or Cooperative bank. Documents: land records, identity proof, address proof, Aadhaar, passport-size photograph.
Application URL: https://www.nabard.org/content1.aspx?id=568
Source PDF: https://www.nabard.org/auth/writereaddata/File/KCC_REVISED_GUIDELINES.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
metadata.benefit_amount: Credit limit based on land holding

scheme_name: e-Shram Portal — National Database of Unorganised Workers
page_content:
Scheme Name: e-Shram Portal — National Database of Unorganised Workers
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Labour and Employment
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Unorganised workers aged 16 to 59 years. Workers including construction workers, migrant workers, street vendors, domestic workers, agricultural labourers, fishermen etc. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. Annual income below Rs. 200000. Not an income tax payee. Not a member of EPFO or ESIC.
Benefit Amount: Accident insurance Rs. 2 lakh
Benefits: Unique Universal Account Number (UAN) that is portable. Accident insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh. Access to all social security schemes of government. Priority in government welfare schemes.
Application Process: Register at eshram.gov.in or through Common Service Centres. Documents: Aadhaar card linked to mobile number, bank account details.
Application URL: https://eshram.gov.in
Source PDF: https://eshram.gov.in/content/uploads/2021/08/eSHRAM-FAQs-English.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: e-Shram Portal — National Database of Unorganised Workers
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment

scheme_name: UP Vridha Pension Yojana (Old Age Pension Uttar Pradesh)
page_content:
Scheme Name: UP Vridha Pension Yojana (Old Age Pension Uttar Pradesh)
Ministry/Department: Department of Social Welfare, Uttar Pradesh Government
State: Uttar Pradesh
Eligibility Criteria: Persons aged 60 years and above who are permanent residents of Uttar Pradesh. Annual family income should not exceed Rs. 46080 in rural areas and Rs. 56460 in urban areas. All caste categories including SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. Occupation: senior citizen, other.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 1000 per month
Benefits: Monthly pension of Rs. 1000 directly credited to bank account. Amount enhanced periodically by state government.
Application Process: Apply online at sspy-up.gov.in or through Jan Seva Kendras. Documents: age proof, income certificate, Aadhaar card, bank passbook, domicile certificate.
Application URL: https://sspy-up.gov.in
Source PDF: https://sspy-up.gov.in/HindiPages/oldagepension.aspx

metadata.scheme_name: UP Vridha Pension Yojana (Old Age Pension Uttar Pradesh)
metadata.ministry: Department of Social Welfare, Uttar Pradesh Government

scheme_name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Kisan Evam Khetihar Mazdoor Jeevan Suraksha Yojana
page_content:
Scheme Name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Kisan Evam Khetihar Mazdoor Jeevan Suraksha Yojana
Ministry/Department: Agriculture Department, Haryana Government
State: Haryana
Eligibility Criteria: Farmers and agricultural workers of Haryana who meet with accident during farming operations. Age 10 to 65 years. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General. Occupation: farmer, worker, agricultural labourer.
Benefit Amount: Compensation up to Rs. 5 lakh
Benefits: Compensation of Rs. 5 lakh in case of death or permanent disability due to farming accident. Rs. 2.5 lakh for partial disability. Medical reimbursement up to Rs. 1 lakh.
Application Process: Register at agriharyana.gov.in. Submit FIR or accident report, medical documents, bank account details within 30 days of accident.
Application URL: https://agriharyana.gov.in
Source PDF: https://agriharyana.gov.in/Documents/Kisan_Suraksha_Yojana.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Haryana Mukhyamantri Kisan Evam Khetihar Mazdoor Jeevan Suraksha Yojana
metadata.ministry: Agriculture Department, Haryana Government

scheme_name: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme for SC Students
page_content:
Scheme Name: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme for SC Students
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Scheduled Caste (SC) students studying at post matriculation or post secondary stage. Annual parental income should not exceed Rs. 250000. Caste category: SC only. Occupation: student. Age 14 to 30 years. Must be studying in a recognized institution.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 1200 to Rs. 9000 per annum
Benefits: Scholarship ranging from Rs. 1200 to Rs. 9000 per year depending on course level. Additional maintenance allowance. Readers allowance for blind students.
Application Process: Apply through National Scholarship Portal at scholarships.gov.in or through state scholarship portals. Documents: caste certificate, income certificate, Aadhaar, enrollment certificate, bank account.
Application URL: https://scholarships.gov.in
Source PDF: https://scholarships.gov.in/docs/PostMatric_SC_guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Post Matric Scholarship Scheme for SC Students
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment

scheme_name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
page_content:
Scheme Name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Traditional artisans and craftspeople working with their hands and tools. 18 traditional trades covered including carpenter, blacksmith, potter, weaver, goldsmith, mason, tailor. Age 18 years and above. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General. Occupation: worker, artisan, differently abled. Annual income no restriction. One member per family eligible.
Benefit Amount: Collateral-free loan up to Rs. 3 lakh, Rs. 15000 toolkit grant
Benefits: Recognition as Vishwakarma with certificate and ID card. Rs. 15000 toolkit incentive. Skill training at Rs. 500 per day stipend. Collateral-free loan: Rs. 1 lakh in first tranche, Rs. 2 lakh in second tranche at 5% interest. Digital transaction incentive of Rs. 1 per transaction up to 100 transactions per month.
Application Process: Register at pmvishwakarma.gov.in or at Common Service Centre. Documents: Aadhaar card, ration card, proof of trade, bank account details.
Application URL: https://pmvishwakarma.gov.in
Source PDF: https://pmvishwakarma.gov.in/assets/docs/PM_Vishwakarma_Guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: PM Vishwakarma Scheme
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
metadata.benefit_amount: Collateral-free loan up to Rs. 3 lakh + Rs. 15000 toolkit grant

scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
page_content:
Scheme Name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Finance
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Any Indian citizen above 10 years of age who does not have a bank account. All caste categories including SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. No minimum balance required. Applicable to all occupations: farmer, student, worker, woman entrepreneur, senior citizen, differently abled.
Benefit Amount: Free bank account + Rs. 2 lakh accident insurance
Benefits: Zero balance bank account with RuPay debit card. Accidental insurance cover of Rs. 2 lakh. Life insurance cover of Rs. 30000. Overdraft facility up to Rs. 10000. Access to pension and insurance products.
Application Process: Visit any bank branch or Business Correspondent with Aadhaar card or any valid government ID proof and one passport-size photograph.
Application URL: https://pmjdy.gov.in
Source PDF: https://pmjdy.gov.in/files/E-circulars/2014/29082014.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Finance
metadata.benefit_amount: Free bank account + Rs. 2 lakh accident insurance

scheme_name: UP Widow Pension Scheme (Nirashrit Mahila Pension Yojana)
page_content:
Scheme Name: UP Widow Pension Scheme (Nirashrit Mahila Pension Yojana)
Ministry/Department: Department of Social Welfare, Uttar Pradesh Government
State: Uttar Pradesh
Eligibility Criteria: Widows who are permanent residents of Uttar Pradesh. Age 18 to 60 years. Annual family income should not exceed Rs. 200000. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. Gender: female. Occupation: other.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 1000 per month
Benefits: Monthly pension of Rs. 1000 directly credited to bank account. Financial security for widows and destitute women.
Application Process: Apply online at sspy-up.gov.in or through Jan Seva Kendras. Documents: death certificate of husband, income certificate, Aadhaar card, bank passbook, domicile certificate, age proof.
Application URL: https://sspy-up.gov.in
Source PDF: https://sspy-up.gov.in/HindiPages/widow_pension.aspx

metadata.scheme_name: UP Widow Pension Scheme (Nirashrit Mahila Pension Yojana)
metadata.ministry: Department of Social Welfare, Uttar Pradesh Government

scheme_name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM) Pension Scheme
page_content:
Scheme Name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM) Pension Scheme
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Labour and Employment
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Unorganised workers aged 18 to 40 years. Monthly income not exceeding Rs. 15000. Not covered under EPFO, ESIC or NPS. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. Occupation: worker, farmer, differently abled.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 3000 per month pension after age 60
Benefits: Assured monthly pension of Rs. 3000 after attaining 60 years of age. Voluntary and contributory pension. Government contributes equal amount as worker. In case of death, spouse receives 50% of pension.
Application Process: Enroll through Common Service Centres, LIC offices or online at maandhan.in. Documents: Aadhaar card, savings bank account or Jan Dhan account with IFSC code, mobile number.
Application URL: https://maandhan.in
Source PDF: https://maandhan.in/content/uploads/2019/09/PM-SYM-Brochure.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: PM Shram Yogi Maan-dhan (PM-SYM) Pension Scheme
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Labour and Employment
metadata.benefit_amount: Rs. 3000 per month pension after age 60

scheme_name: Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students (Technical Education)
page_content:
Scheme Name: Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students (Technical Education)
Ministry/Department: Ministry of Education, AICTE
State: All India
Eligibility Criteria: Girl students admitted to first year of Diploma or Degree level technical program in AICTE approved institution. Age 18 to 30 years. Annual family income not exceeding Rs. 800000. Gender: female. All caste categories including SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. Occupation: student. Only one girl child per family per year.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 50000 per annum
Benefits: Rs. 50000 per annum for 30000 girl students across India. Amount covers tuition fee and incidental charges. Awarded for each year of course duration.
Application Process: Apply through National Scholarship Portal at scholarships.gov.in during the application window. Documents: Aadhaar, income certificate, admission letter, bank account details.
Application URL: https://scholarships.gov.in
Source PDF: https://scholarships.gov.in/docs/Pragati_Scholarship_guidelines.pdf

metadata.scheme_name: Pragati Scholarship for Girl Students (Technical Education)
metadata.ministry: Ministry of Education, AICTE

scheme_name: UP Divyang Pension Yojana (Disability Pension Uttar Pradesh)
page_content:
Scheme Name: UP Divyang Pension Yojana (Disability Pension Uttar Pradesh)
Ministry/Department: Department of Divyangjan Empowerment, Uttar Pradesh
State: Uttar Pradesh
Eligibility Criteria: Persons with at least 40% disability who are permanent residents of Uttar Pradesh. Age 18 years and above. Annual family income should not exceed Rs. 200000. All caste categories: SC, ST, OBC, General, Minority. Occupation: differently abled. Must have disability certificate from competent authority.
Benefit Amount: Rs. 1000 per month
Benefits: Monthly pension of Rs. 1000 directly credited to bank account. Additional benefits under various convergence schemes.
Application Process: Apply online at sspy-up.gov.in or through Jan Seva Kendras. Documents: disability certificate, income certificate, Aadhaar card, bank passbook, domicile certificate.
Application URL: https://sspy-up.gov.in
Source PDF: https://sspy-up.gov.in/HindiPages/divyang_pension.aspx

metadata.scheme_name: UP Divyang Pension Yojana (Disability Pension Uttar Pradesh)
metadata.ministry: Department of Divyangjan Empowerment, Uttar Pradesh
